_comment: Maps ransomware.live's own 'activity' sector strings (confirmed live: Business Services, Technology, Healthcare, Manufacturing, Consumer Services, Construction, Transportation/Logistics, Financial Services, Public Sector, Agriculture and Food Production, Education, Hospitality and Tourism, Energy, Telecommunication, Not Found) into the four industry buckets requested for the homepage heat map. Case-insensitive substring match; anything not listed here falls into 'Other'.
